response.justification: Candidate has ~16 years of software experience but C++ exposure is limited to a 6-month stint at National Instruments (2014-2015) and an undergraduate thesis. The bulk of their career is in JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang for web and data-integration work, with no demonstrated experience in industrial automation, MQTT, message brokers, IEC 62443 / SDL, or the protocol stack (Modbus, OPC UA, DNP 3.0). This role demands a hands-on senior C++ engineer for on-prem industrial platforms, which is not where this candidate's depth lies.
strengths: Long tenure (16+ years) with broad full-stack and distributed-systems exposure
Experience with low-latency, high-throughput backend systems at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Strong engineering-practice background: TDD, CI/CD, mentoring, workshops, OSS contributions
concerns: Minimal and dated C++ experience (~6 months a decade ago); no recent STL/OOP C++ delivery
No industrial-automation, IEC 62443, SDL, MQTT, or message-broker experience evident
Core stack (TS/Node/DLang/web) misaligned with the C++ on-prem platform focus of the role

key_factors.factor: No industrial cybersecurity / IEC 62443 / SDL background
Strong general engineering seniority and distributed-systems exposure
